Crust: Soft, tender dough with white color; slightly underbaked centre, crisp cornicione
Sauce: Fresh, intensely umami tomato sauce; bright red, not overly salty
Cheese: Mozzarella with mild salinity, creamy texture; subtle richness, no overpowering salt
Basil/Extras: Fresh, aromatic basil; extras sparse but well-integrated
Balance/Harmony: Tomato umami dominates, mozzarella provides gentle support; slight imbalance in freshness vs intensity
Appearance/Aroma: Reddish tones from tomatoes, mozzarella dominates visual; faint wood-fired aroma
Overall: Takeaway margherita with standout tomato umami; could be sharper in freshness. Best for tomato lovers seeking simplicity.
